NAVAREA XIX 139/25
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 LAUNCH OPERATION WILL BE CONDUCTED FROM 
 0000 TO 0600 UTC 19 OCT 25.
 IN AREAS BOUNDED BY:

 A. 69-37.37N 012-43.13E
 B. 69-11.49N 014-04.83E
 C. 69-43.84N 016-37.83E
 D. 70-16.29N 015-43.33E
 E. 70-42.57N 015-38.13E
 F. 70-25.35N 013-18.43E

 ANDOEYA SPACE CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 AND +47 76 14 44 28 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16
 E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO. 
 FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 18/2025
